name: Can anyone guarantee my site will appear in ChatGPT or Google AI Overviews?
description: No legitimate provider can guarantee AI citations or rankings. AI systems change often and do not expose their full decision rules, so any promise of guaranteed

mainEntity.name: Can anyone guarantee my site will appear in ChatGPT or Google AI Overviews?

acceptedAnswer.text: No one can guarantee AI visibility or rankings because search algorithms and AI answer systems change constantly, and platforms do not reveal their exact logic. A credible provider should talk about improving your odds, not promising a fixed position.
acceptedAnswer.description: No legitimate provider can guarantee AI citations or rankings. AI systems change often and do not expose their full decision rules, so any promise of guaranteed placement is a red flag.
